visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women, one in a white long-sleeved shirt and light jeans and the other in a sage green sweatshirt and khaki pants, stand side-by-side in a brightly lit indoor office space. They bow deeply toward the camera with formal posture and polite facial expressions. The background features a white storage cabinet, a window showing a cityscape at dusk, and a small potted plant on the shelf. (2) A man with short brown hair, wearing a brown short-sleeved button-down over a black hoodie and dark trousers, walks into the frame from the right. He accepts a green and black varsity jacket from one of the women and then hands her his bag while they converse. The lighting is consistent and bright, illuminating the clean marble-patterned flooring. (3) The man reaches for a blue broom and dustpan being held by the woman in the white shirt. He takes the cleaning tools firmly in his hands while the two women turn around and walk toward a glass door in the background. (4) The women exit the room through the glass door, leaving the man alone in the foreground. He begins to sweep the marble floor with the blue broom, looking down at his work with a serious expression as he performs the manual labor task in the office setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: POV：老闆該有的樣子. [Subtitle]: 老闆好. (2) [Subtitle]: 早 怎麼樣. (3) [Subtitle]: 這個月業績多少了. (4) [Subtitle]: 報告老闆 300萬. (5) [Subtitle]: 300萬？ (6) [Subtitle]: OKOK 那早點下班啊. (7) [Subtitle]: 謝謝老闆.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One male with short brown hair wearing a brown shirt over a black hoodie. Two females, one in a white shirt and one in a green sweatshirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern office interior with white cabinets, marble-tiled floors, a glass door entrance, and a window overlooking other buildings.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with the clear, synchronized high-pitched voices of two females greeting 'Lao ban hao' in a respectful tone. There is no background music at this stage, resulting in a very high signal-to-noise ratio. The room acoustics suggest an indoor studio or office environment with very low noise. (2) A male voice responds with a casual 'Zao zao,' followed by a conversational question regarding monthly performance. His pitch is moderate and his tone is inquisitive but calm. The speech rate is natural, and there are no background sound effects or music masking the dialogue. (3) A female voice answers energetically, reporting a high figure. The vocal intensity increases slightly to show excitement. The male voice then acknowledges with 'OKOK' and suggests they leave work early. The dialogue remains crisp and clearly enunciated throughout this interaction. (4) Suddenly, a loud upbeat pop song with a strong electronic beat and male vocals kicks in. The music has a high tempo (around 128 BPM) and a cheerful major tonality. Simultaneously, the faint rhythmic percussive sound of broom bristles brushing against a hard floor surface can be heard, marking the transition from dialogue to the final scene.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses situational irony to subvert typical workplace dynamics for comedic effect. It portrays a 'dream boss' who takes over the menial cleaning tasks and allows his high-performing employees to leave work early as a reward, contrasting with traditional hierarchical expectations.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A short comedic sketch subverting workplace power dynamics.
